forecast-period.text: Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. The chance of a thunderstorm near the Barossa Valley early this evening. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and early afternoon. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
High
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Partly cloudy. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the day then becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. The chance of a thunderstorm later this evening. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]
Cloudy. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northeasterly during the morning then tending east to southeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Cloudy. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and early afternoon. Winds southerly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
High
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending easterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 30 to 45 km/h in the morning then turning southerly 25 to 35 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]
Cloudy. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then turning south to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Cloudy. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late evening.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Possible small hail in the south in the late afternoon and evening. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 30 to 45 km/h in the morning then turning southerly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
High
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the evening then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm, possibly severe with damaging winds, large hail and heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon and evening.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the early morning. Winds south to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]
Mostly sunny. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Becoming cloudy. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. The chance of a thunderstorm early this evening. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southerly in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and early afternoon. Winds south to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the southwest, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the southwest, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending east to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm, possibly severe with damaging winds, large hail and heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southwesterly in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the early morning. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]
Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 23.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 26.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm, possibly severe with damaging winds, large hail and heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly in the late evening.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching 20 to 25.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.
Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 23.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to northeasterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching 20 to 25.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Streaky Bay, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm east of Ceduna, possibly severe with damaging winds, large hail and heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 40 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower east of Ceduna in the early morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:30am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Partly cloudy. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending southeasterly in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning then tending northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 31.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm, possibly severe with damaging winds, large hail and heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds southerly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Cloudy. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely later tonight. The chance of a thunderstorm later this evening. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Winds southerly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:30am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]
Cloudy. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southeasterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the east coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending easterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Coober Pedy. Thunderstorms possibly severe with damaging winds, large hail and heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding south of Woomera. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the late afternoon.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 34.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 5:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]
Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 27.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 28.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 32.

Mostly clear. Medium chance of showers south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Leigh Creek. Thunderstorms possibly severe with damaging winds, large hail and heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding south of Yunta. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers east of Leigh Creek in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 30 to 45 km/h early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 23 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 37.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]
Sunny. Winds southeasterly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 25.
Sunny. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching 20 to 25.
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
